subComponents.name: CalendarTitle
subComponents.description: Navigation header with left chevron, month/year label, and right chevron. Shared with Calendar Simple.

subComponents.name: DayItemRangeCalendar
subComponents.description: Range-capable day cell. Width is flexible (flex: 1 0 0) — fills row equally. Height 40px. Supports 5 selection states, today indicator, and Planned type.
subComponents.note: Named 'DayItemRagneCalendar' in Figma (typo). Documented here as DayItemRangeCalendar.

anatomy.description: Outer card surface. 374px wide, border-radius 16px, elevation/light/02 shadow. Background: --surface/neutral/default (#f1f2f4).
Header row: left chevron (24px) + month/year label (Manrope Bold 14px --text/body) + right chevron (24px). Full width, space-between.
Row of 7 abbreviated labels (SUN–SAT). 40px height per cell, equally distributed. Manrope Regular 11px --text/placeholder.
5–6 rows of 7 DayItemRangeCalendar cells representing the displayed month plus overflow days.

states.name: Default
states.description: Standard view. No selection, no today indicator, no planned indicators. Uses DayItemRangeCalendar cells.

states.name: Today
states.description: The current date is marked with a today indicator (circle ring outline). Planned activity indicators may appear on certain days. Uses DayItemRangeCalendar cells.

states.name: Range
states.description: A date range is selected. Start and end dates have a dark 36px circle; all days between them have a semi-transparent band (--day-item/bg-selected-middle). The today indicator may also appear simultaneously. Uses DayItemRangeCalendar cells.

dayItemStates.description: Standard selectable day. Plain date number.
Day with a planned event. Date number + 6×6px dot indicator below.
Current date. Circle ring outline (36×36px) centered in cell.
dayItemStates.todayIndicator: 36×36px circle ring outline (image asset in Figma)

dayItemStates.description: Range start date. Dark 36px filled circle + right half-band from center to right edge.
dayItemStates.band: right half: from center to right edge, 36px height

dayItemStates.description: Days between start and end. Full-width semi-transparent band only — no circle. Text is dark (NOT inverted).
dayItemStates.note: Text is NOT inverted — uses dark --day-item/text-selected-middle, not light --day-item/text-selected.

dayItemStates.description: Range end date. Dark 36px filled circle + left half-band from left edge to center.
dayItemStates.band: left half: from left edge to center, 36px height

rangeBand.description: The semi-transparent band that visually connects the start and end dates across cells and row breaks.
rangeBand.startCell: half-band from center to right edge + dark circle on top
rangeBand.endCell: half-band from left edge to center + dark circle on top

variantNote: No structural variants. Single visual style.
sizeNote: Single size. Container: 374px wide. Day cells: flex width (flex: 1 0 0), 40px height.
weekdayOrderNote: Week starts on Sunday — confirmed from Figma.
usageContext: Date range selection in monthly calendar views.
Confirmed use in Dojo Customer App for date range filtering (node 316:1281).
notes: Composite component: CalendarRange wraps CalendarTitle + weekday header + DayItemRangeCalendar grid.
All three states (Default, Today, Range) use DayItemRangeCalendar for every day cell.
Day cells use flex: 1 0 0 width — not a fixed 40px square.
Width is 374px — 8px narrower than Calendar Simple (382px). They are not interchangeable at fixed widths.
Middle-of-range text is NOT inverted: uses --day-item/text-selected-middle (#1d1d23).
Figma names the sub-component 'DayItemRagneCalendar' (typo). All documentation uses 'DayItemRangeCalendar'.
